title: Caesar Against the Pirates

actors: Gustavo Rojo, Abbe Lane, Gordon Mitchell
plot: Julius Caesar flees Rome because of a conspirary against him and is given refuge the king of Bithnyia. He finds a woman there and while he escorts her to Rhodes their ship is attacked. Caught by the pirates he asks for help to get...
